name: Crock Pot Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can diced tomatoes, with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast on top of the stove beforehand.
2. If possible, complete the prep work the night before.
3. Add all ingredients to the crock pot.
4. Cook on low for 8 hours or high for 4-5 hours until tender.
